headline: Q&A: How a 12-Year Succession Plan Helped HB Wealth Grow
summary: CEO Thomas Carroll discusses how HB Wealth has grown to a $32 billion RIA despite, and partly due to, founder changes.

headline: IGLB vs SCHQ: Corporate Bonds Beat Treasuries on Yield and Trailing Returns
summary: IGLB's 5.40% dividend yield and stronger 5-year performance make it compelling for income investors seeking long-duration exposure.
